build.buildCommand:
rtk git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
ci: fill reusable workflow bodies (lint/test/build/security/release)

Replace the placeholder echo bodies with working implementations. Each
workflow installs the matching toolchain conditionally on the `language`
input and gates work behind lockfile/manifest existence checks so the
same workflow is usable from any downstream FlexNetOS repo.

reusable-lint.yml:
- bun/node/python/rust toolchain setup conditional on language input
- markdown lint (markdownlint-cli2) and actionlint always when present
- per-language linters: bun/npm `lint` script, ruff+black, cargo fmt
  --check + clippy (with `-D warnings` when fail-on-warning=true)
- mixed mode runs every detected toolchain; pin language explicitly to
  skip detection

reusable-test.yml:
- bun test / npm test / pytest (via uv) / cargo nextest (fallback to
  cargo test if nextest missing)
- coverage opt-in via `coverage` input; threshold enforced by
  coverage CLI; artifacts uploaded best-effort with retention 14 days
- extra-args input for passing flags to the test runner

reusable-build.yml:
- bun run build / npm run build / uv build / cargo build (release or
  debug profile)
- artifact upload only when artifact-name is non-empty, retention 30
  days, error if no files match

reusable-security.yml:
- matrix-prep job converts comma-separated `languages` input into a
  JSON matrix via jq (GHA has no string replace function)
- CodeQL init + autobuild + analyze with security-and-quality query
  suite, SARIF uploaded to the Security tab
- Trivy fs scan (blocks on the severity threshold) + Trivy IaC scan
  (reports but never blocks); both SARIFs uploaded
- Gitleaks over full history (fetch-depth: 0)

reusable-release.yml:
- release-please default; semantic-release alternative selectable
- outputs `release-created` and `tag-name` so callers can chain
- moving-major-tag job: when release-please tags vX.Y.Z, force-push
  the vX tag to the new commit (this is the only force-push the repo
  policy permits)
- optional `release-token` secret for branch-protection bypass

All five pass actionlint clean. ci.yml's existing calls to
reusable-lint (language=mixed) and reusable-security (languages=
javascript,python) remain compatible — no caller-side change needed.

reusable-secrets.yml and reusable-submodule-bump.yml are unchanged this
PR; the former depends on USER.TODO §4 (real GPG keys), the latter
already has a working body.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" 2>&1 | tail -5
